name: Roasted Tomatillo Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 Jalapeno chiles, stemmed and seeded if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Place the tomatillos, garlic, and jalapenos on a baking tray and broil, turning frequently, until evenly charred, 15 minutes. (The trick to keeping the garlic from burning is to tuck it under the tomatoes.)
3. Set aside to cool.
4. Transfer the roasted ingredients to a food processor fitted with the metal blade.
5. Add the cilantro and water and puree until smooth.
6. Season with the salt and pepper and serve.
Makes 2 1/2 cups.
Store in the refrigerator for 3-5 days or in the freezer for weeks.
